note: Phase 1 of capsule UI clean-up: char counter is now byte-accurate, mode-aware, and turns red on overflow; per-mode policy caps in CAPSULE_MAX corrected (open_note 80 / structured 128 / cert 64 / doc_ref 128) — used to be 243 across the board which let the UI accept inputs the node would have refused. buildCapsulePayloadFromForm now refuses oversized text BEFORE signing with a clear inline error citing the byte count. Multi-recipient + capsule guard reworded to plain English. In sost-transactions.html, type tags renamed: LIVE → WALLET + CLI, the doc_ref row → CLI ONLY (no file picker in the wallet yet), DEFERRED → PLANNED so the language matches what the wallet does. Fases 2-6 (web doc-ref, multi-recipient + public capsule, preflight, sealed modes, doc) están en el roadmap del commit pero NO se aplican en este push. Force-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
